titleStmt.title: SII 23.351: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 351. (A.R. No. 351 of 1907.) Tiruviśalūr, Kumbhakonam Taluk, Tanjavur District Śivayōganātha temple—on the north wall of the same maṇḍapa Rājēndra-Chōḷa I: (?) year 4: 1016-17 A.D.

summary.p: This is built in at the beginning of each line and is also incomplete. It seems to register another and similar grant of land by the same donor at Śrī Pirāntakachaturvēdimaṅgalam a brahmadēya in Ārkkāṭṭuk-kūṟṟam a division of Pāṇḍikulāśanivaḷanāḍu after purchasing the plots from the sabhā of the place. The beneficiary also is probably the same individual (mentioned in No. 350 above).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ṭu 4Āvatu Āḻvār śrīparān=takaṉ kun=tavaippirāṭṭiyār paḻai yāṟṟukkoyilil māḷikaiyil Ātipūmi Eḻuntaruḷiiruntu pāṇṭi kulācaṉivaḷanāṭṭu Ārkkāṭṭukkūṟṟattu brahmadeyam śrīpirāntakac caturvetima kuc calliyapokam vaikka Ivvūrc cavaiyārpakkal Irājentiracoḻarkku yāṇṭu 3Āvatu kāvā Aṭṭikkoṇ
kaṇavativāykkālukku vaṭakku mutaṟkaṇṇāṟṟu mutaṟcaturattu niṉpai Āccappaṭṭa comayāciyār Uḷḷiṭṭa catukkattārkkuc cavaiyāritāy Irunta nilam Araimāviṉ kiḻ Araiye Araikkālu kārampicceṭṭu viṣṇupaṭṭaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭa catukkattārkku paṭṭu cavaiyāritāy Irunta nilam Oru māvum muṉ rāja
ṟai Iḻicciṉa nilamāvatu Ivūr piṭākai varivaṇṭatuṟai Ātit tavatikku meṟkku kaṇavativāykkālukku vaṭakku Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu mutaṟcaturattu kantāṭai viṣṇupaṭṭa sarva [ krattuvā] ḷ Uḷḷiṭṭārkku paṭṭu sabhaiyāritāy Irunta nilam mākāṇimuntiri kaik kiḻ Araikkālum Ivvūrp piStops here incomplete.
Digital edition of SII 23.351 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
